successCriteria.description: The file exports Zod schemas: createLeaveSchema, approveLeaveParamsSchema, rejectLeaveParamsSchema, rejectLeaveBodySchema, cancelLeaveParamsSchema, getLeaveParamsSchema, getBalanceParamsSchema.
The file imports only { z } from 'zod' and contains no other import statements.

constraints: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing (the schemas are the validation layer).
The file must only import { z } from 'zod' and no other imports, as per the auto-diagnosis correction.
outOfScope: Any other files in src/modules/leave besides leave.validation.ts
Implementation of leave service, repository, or other modules
Integration with Fastify, RBAC middleware, or other dependencies beyond the validation schemas themselves
